feed.title: AO3 - Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Lie Lie Lie
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 259,140Chapters: 92/100Kudos: 1,232

Summary: Marinette Dupain-Cheng had a grand falling out with Adrien. He had learned the truth, that his father was Hawk Moth and his girlfriend had kept this secret. Chrysalis was dead,her life was spiraling out of despair. Her Maman let her leave with her Uncle Wang, but not to Shanghai. Hey, there is another restaurant opening in Gotham, and Uncle Wang needed a helper. Goodbye, City of Love, and welcome, Capital City of Crime. __________________________________________________________________ Damian Wayne does not get “dumped”. However, given the Wayne Gala is close and his brothers plan to make fun of his being alone, Damian needs a plan of action: a pretend girlfriend. The target? His friend, Maps Mizoguchi. Approaching the raven-haired under the tree, he gives the order for a romantic alliance. But when the girl turns around, it’s not Maps. It’s a confused French transfer student holding a macaron. A lesser man would apologize for the mistake. Damian Wayne? He doubles down. She has the right hair. She is a variable he can control. “You,” he decides, refusing to admit error. “You are an acceptable substitute. Don’t be late.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Marinette Dupain-Cheng: Another Uchiha
entry.summary:
Author: levaxre

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,083Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Marinette is another sole survivor to the Uchiha Clan but her real name is Katsumi Uchiha. She was dropped here by two anbus who were Snake and Cat who had dropped her with the Dupain-Chengs for the protection. She is the sister of Obito Uchiha. She archived Sharingan and Mangekyo Sharingan at a young age when being in Paris. But back in Konoha, Obito reveal he had a younger sister that Anko and Yugao knows of.

entry.title: Miraculous: A Tale of Ladybug and Catman
entry.summary:
Author: Eloisa

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,370Chapters: 2/15Kudos: 45

Summary: Damian Wayne's life is going well. He has his vigilante work in Gotham. He has a career plan. He even has a girlfriend, though if his brothers could tolerate her better, he'd feel less inclined to take a blade to them. But when a supervillain attacks a concert he, his girlfriend Marinette and almost all his family are attending, he - and the rest of the Batfamily - are forced to take drastic measures to counteract the threat.If only he knew where Marinette had gone to hide and why that foreign hero Ladybug looks so annoyingly familiar.Inspired by / an entirely unauthorised sequel to The Great IKEA Game by IcedAquarius.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Love Language: Gift Giving
entry.summary:
Author: Intercoursefluids

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,070Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 1,833

Summary: Marinette has taken to social media with her designs and ideas. Unfortunately, (or fortunately, depending on how you see it) one of her viewers has made it to where she has to be *very* careful with her words. A single mention of something she's debating on getting or that she needs to get something and boom, someone sends her a gift. They never attach a name or any identification. Marinette doesn't know who they are, but they won't. stop. sending. her. gifts.Honestly, she's getting worried about them and their bad spending habits.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Steal My Phone, Steal My Heart (Daminette)
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,126Chapters: 23/30Kudos: 275

Summary: After 48 sleepless hours in Paris, a disheveled Marinette accidentally grabs the wrong phone—belonging to a rude American tourist. What follows is a chaotic chain of misadventures across the city. But as the day spirals out of control, could this unexpected mix-up be the start of something better?

entry.title: Fragile Threads
entry.summary:
Author: heqvenlymoons

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,200Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 75

Summary: It somehow got out that Marinette Dupain-Cheng has been living with the elusive Waynes. Seeing a new and easy target to make Bruce Wayne finally pay the ransom, Joker kidnaps Marinette and holds her hostage at a warehouse. In his desperation to save the most tolerable person in the manor after Alfred, Damian—as Robin—confronts Joker at the warehouse without a plan, resulting in them both dying in an explosion. This somehow resulted in Damian being stuck in a seemingly endless time loop where he is forced to relive the moments leading up to Marinette’s death. [SLOW UPDATES]

entry.title: He's looking at you, kid
entry.summary:
Author: Arapricity

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,891Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 1,432

Summary: Marinette has been managing a small business, working as class president, helping out at the bakery, doing work as the Guardian, saving the city, and possibly the world daily. Sadly, wasn't any closer to finding Hawkmoth's identity. She was also stretched thin and not at her peak mental health. Regardless, she had her Court established and with that, she acquired a support system to help her with the 'Lila Problem' and with fighting the akumas. However, with Batfamily finding out about the situation in Paris during a penpal activity her school made her go through, changes are coming. If these changes include finding more friends, family, and maybe a gorgeous boyfriend, who was she to say no?

entry.title: Maid and Butler café...?
entry.summary:
Author: MioShiTomioka

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,380Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 11

Summary: Fundraising for Gotham academy is normal-ish.Need new equipment for the school that you should go to Bruce Wayne for? It's fundraiser time.One class is holding an in-school café; of course, to appeal to other students it's a maid/butler café. Who's the student they’ve all come to see? Damian Wayne, in a butler suit (he might have borrowed it from Alfred)

entry.title: Hello, Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: BookofSunshine

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,349Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 76

Summary: Guardian Marinette Dupain-Cheng moves to Gotham to combat the imbalance plaguing the city. Hopefully, she'll manage to stay under Batman's radar. (Nobody said anything about the rest of the Batfamily though...)

entry.title: Bandaids don't fix bulletholes.
entry.summary:
Author: MioShiTomioka

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,435Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 184

Summary: Growing up in a home without anyone there to support you isn’t easy. She had to learn that the hard way, however being sent to the most dangerous city in the world to attend the academy there was a new low even for her family. It was like they wanted her to get killed by someone like the joker!   Comment moderation on to stop bots

entry.title: Damian’s new Dark League of Assassins
entry.summary:
Author: Komneid128

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,246Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Damian Wayne was never meant to abandon the League of Assassins ideals nor did he truly want to. While the world believes he chose a different path with Batman, a different way to do things but Damian remained tethered to its legacy, waiting. Now, Armed with Wayne resources and the ruthless discipline of the League, Damian sets out to fulfill that destiny at last. Make a new better League and only one force truly stands in his way: the Justice League. This version of Damian is darker, more calculating, and far more dangerous every move deliberate, every alliance strategic. At one point, Marinette is merely another piece in his carefully constructed plan, a means to an end. But what begins as manipulation slowly transforms into something genuine.Against his own expectations, Damian falls in love.And Marinette becomes not just his weakness but his future queen.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne
  • Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug
  • Damian Wayne
  • Dark Damian Wayne
  • Badass Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug

entry.title: The Shadow Queen of Wayne Enterprises
entry.summary:
Author: Hero_Iron_Dad

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,717Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 330

Summary: Ten years of marriage to Damian Wayne has taught Marinette one thing: Gotham’s elite are nothing compared to the ghosts of her past in Paris.When Marinette stops by Wayne Enterprises to bring her husband lunch, she expects nothing more than a quick chat with the staff and a quiet moment with Damian. She doesn’t expect to run into the trio that once made her life a living hell. Adrien, Alya, and Lila are in Gotham, desperate for a contract and still convinced that Marinette is the same "bakery girl" they can push around.But Marinette is no longer the girl who hides. She is the head of the MDC empire, a woman who commands respect, and the wife of a man who does not take kindly to his Queen being insulted. Lila Rossi is about to learn that in Wayne Enterprises, lies don't just fall apart—they get you blacklisted.OrDaminette. Marinette come to Wayne enterprices to give her husband lunch.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Tangled in Claws & Stars
entry.summary:
Author: vixenwithaplot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,942Chapters: 49/50Kudos: 221

Summary: Gotham never slept.Its skyline cut sharp against clouds, alive with whispers of shadows and secrets.Somewhere beneath that pulse, a girl arrived—carrying dreams, sketches, and the faint echo of a world she left behind.She didn’t know it yet, but her presence tugged at the city itself, stirring currents unseen.Across the streets, a boy moved through shadows, precise and silent, trained to see everything yet notice nothing… until now.He didn’t see her. Not yet.But the air changed where she walked.A thread of magic hummed between worlds, delicate yet unbreakable.Destiny had begun to weave.Two souls, bound by threads, claws, and stars,were about to meet.And the city, as always, watched.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Damian Wayne | Robin/Marinette Dupain-Cheng
  • Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne

entry.title: i’m standing alone at the edge of the world (am i a lucky girl?)
entry.summary:
Author: DarlingFriend

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 902Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 43

Summary: Marinette was fairly certain that a tape recorder wasn’t going to help her solve the end of the world. Maybe this just wasn’t her fight anymore.   · ─ ·✶· ⋆ ⁺ ‧ ☽◯☾ ‧ ⁺ ⋆ ·✶· ─ ·   Or, Marinette tries to prevent the end of the world while leaving a final message for her best friend.

entry.title: Bridgette Fu
entry.summary:
Author: Deala

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,061Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 290

Summary: After the defeat of Chrysalis, Ladybug's team found out about both her and Monarch's identity. After placing the miraculous back in the box, Marinette flees to Gotham with a new identity. Also she joins Dream Academy.

entry.title: Of Mortal Desires
entry.summary:
Author: Jinx-Jade (Trial_and_Error)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,465Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 177

Summary: After years of relentless battles, Marinette finds herself adrift and weary in the aftermath of Hawkmoth’s defeat. By a twist of fate, she ends up in a new city, leaving behind the tangible reminders of her trauma in pursuit of a genuine fresh start. University life brings new friendships and, unexpectedly, sweeps her into a whirlwind romance with someone who understands all too well the scars left by a childhood of being forged into a weapon. Through newfound honesty and boundaries rarely granted to them before, the former child heroes slowly begin to heal; together.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Fate or Chance
entry.summary:
Author: Stephanie_Hearthlight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 106,526Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 3,288

Summary: The sweet irony almost makes Marinette laugh.And to think that the little Parisian had to leave the city of love and reach the city of crime to find true love.Damian, on the other hand, didn't know who to blame.He only knew that he had fallen before the spell of that pair of blue eyes that did not come out of his mind, bringing light to the darkest city in America.Marinette is, despite being hurt, a kind heroine whose soul is as pure as an angel.Damien is generally sullen with everyone. A vigilante who learned what human relationships mean a little late. As fierce as a demon.None of them knows exactly how, but they find their other half in the least likely person.Fate, chance or ...?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Where Do I Belong?
entry.summary:
Author: Intercoursefluids

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,311Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 2,124

Summary: (This is the rewritten version of "Believe Me" that I am hoping I like more)After Tom and Sabine die in a car accident Marinette is forced to come face to face with secrets of her past and figure out where she fits in the world
